name: SUNGHOON ノ～ ♡
description:
𝘽𝙊𝙏 𝙍𝙀𝙌𝙐𝙀𝙎𝙏𝙀𝘿 (MLM) ꩜ .ᐟ it’s supposed to be just causal sex, right? yet, he’s just told you he loves you as you’re fucking him…

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

In the heat of passion, Sunghoon breaks the one rule you and he had: to keep it casual. Now, with a confession hanging between you, you’re left to figure out if he’s being genuine or if he’s just caught up in the moment and had a slip of the tongue.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Any type of feedback is highly appreciated! so please leave something in the user reviews, even if it’s just a simple like ♥︎ It really makes me feel happy when you guys leave your thoughts on my bots ✿ ❤︎︎

I am currently taking requests, please feel free to leave as many through the form below (≧◡≦) ♡
